name: Zwipe AS
summary: Zwipe AS provides biometric payment cards components and wearables technology that enable consumers to authorize transactions with their fingerprints without compromising their privacy. The company provides biometric payment platform, a solution for payment cards; biometric enrolment tablet for mobile registration and authentication of biometric cards by card issuers; and a wearable device for the tokenization of payment applications blended with biometrics. It operates in Norway and internationally. Zwipe AS has a collaboration with Idemia, a disruptive payment platform. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.
